page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores using the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention typically associated with hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data storage needs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. There are no integrated graphics processing units on this instance type.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance for enterprise workloads, though the lack of bundled local storage and GPUs represents a tradeoff for storage-heavy or accelerated computing tasks. The resource profile is designed for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded applications, web serving, and enterprise application hosting that require consistent CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.24xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that ensures dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. This instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation offers predictable performance, making it suitable for enterprise applications, web serving, and multi-threaded workloads that require consistent processing power.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.24xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, 32 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage, running on the KVM hypervisor.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.24xlarge features 96 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated 96-core AMD EPYC server with balanced memory and 32 Gbps network bandwidth for consistent enterprise compute workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core
384.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for consistent data transfer
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with x86_64 architecture
Zero local storage and no integrated GPU accelerators
Designed for enterprise applications, web serving, and multi-threaded workloads
